name: chrome-browser-agent
description: Use visible Google Chrome automation as a general browser agent. This skill can navigate or search, inspect pages via text snapshots, manage tabs, wait for async changes, send key presses, and optionally capture screenshots.
when_to_use: Use this skill ONLY when the task requires actively controlling a visible browser page: playing music, filling forms, clicking buttons, logging in, taking screenshots, or any other interactive web operation.
Call browserSnapshot after navigation and again after major page changes so later actions use fresh refs.
Prefer browserClick and browserType with refs from browserSnapshot, rather than guessing selectors or pretending to know the page structure.
Prefer browserWait over blind repeated snapshots when the page is loading, streaming, or reacting asynchronously.
Use browserScreenshot only as optional auxiliary evidence when the current model supports image input; the text path must remain sufficient without it.
This is the only local browser-control skill kept in DialogueSystem; use it for all visible Google Chrome actions.
when_not_to_use: Do NOT use this skill just to search for information or look up facts. Use web-access (webSearch) instead.
If the user's request can be answered with text alone, do NOT open a browser.
intent_examples: 用 Google Chrome 打开 GitHub 并看看当前页面有哪些可点元素
在可见浏览器里搜索 OpenAI API docs 然后点击结果
帮我打开网站后读取页面，再点登录按钮
在浏览器当前页面找到搜索框并输入关键词
滚动当前页面，然后重新给我一份页面快照
打开新标签页后切回原标签页继续操作
等待页面提示文案出现后再点击下一步
按 Enter 或 Ctrl+L 这类快捷键推进浏览器流程
回到上一页并再次查看页面内容
打开 B 站播放视频
